name: plugin-security-scan
title: 实施插件 Security Scan
description: 对不可变 TPEX 执行共享、分级、可审计且不泄密的安全扫描。
creator: TalexDreamSoul
notes: Shared versioned scanner, artifact-only CLI preflight, Nexus authoritative admission, summary persistence, governance events and server-owned waivers are implemented. 24 focused assertions, CLI builds, Nexus typecheck, plugin validation, scoped lint and two real TPEX smoke scans passed.
